methodsAttempted.query: acceptable use of ICT AI generative
methodsAttempted.notes: Found Teaching@Sydney FAQ referencing Acceptable Use of ICT Resources Policy.
Found official Assessment Procedures page with AI guidance.

summary: Comprehensive discovery via 11 search queries targeting sydney.edu.au and educational-innovation.sydney.edu.au. Found 8 verified official sources spanning student-facing responsible AI use guidance, academic integrity AI policy pages, AI breach definitions, using-AI-to-learn best practices, Teaching@Sydney FAQ on generative AI policy and guardrails, the two-lane assessment approach article, the official Assessment Procedures page, and a news announcement of the AI assessment policy changes. 14 sources rejected as news/opinion articles, student news items, CCE course pages, library/open journal research papers, Teaching@Sydney blog posts, and intranet pages.
